reviews.review_title: Could be great with a few tweaks
reviews.review_description:
I tried this with resistance bands hung over the top of a door as my pulleys. It didn't really work with hand tracking but by holding the controllers as well as the resistance bands it worked well.

I wish it was possible to make the vehicle in the game moved faster! It has a f zero vibe but doesn't feel as fast.

Also I wish it was possible to set the starting difficult of the level. If I'm already warmed up then the easier sections at the start make your workout inefficient.
The game is ok! Need some improvements.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment, we will check it!

reviews.review_description:
this game is cool feels great when ya play  i can see myself zenning out on this one I do believe with abit more development there is an awsome racing game hidden in here too!!

crouch pull both tethers back acceleration 

stand both back shiel as usual

both pulled to either left or right drift round sharp tuns

triggers two different power ups

proper tracks

= exercise racing fun esport!!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review! We are already working on some of the things you propose! come to our discord and stay tuned ->  https://discord.gg/ab6Fhh3Hq5

reviews.review_title: Good but has a hand-registering error
reviews.review_description: Andromeda Sports is certainly an interesting game. However, it seems to have a tracking problem with the right hand. None of my right-hand hits registered in a challenge round, even though the tutorial had no problem with doing so. Regardless, this is a really innovative and interesting way of playing and using VR.

reviews.review_title: Great addition to beat saber to exercise
reviews.review_description: Amazing game, I will soo try with an elastic band and write more, but generally it's really nice to exercise as all your body needs to move. Feels a bit like drifting.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your comment enthusiast420!! I'm pretty sure you will enjoy the newly improved turbo boost ability !

reviews.review_description:
The game loop is fun and it gets you doing the enough exercise that you find yourself sweating after a while.
Absolutely would recommend if you like speed games!!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your comment GerardRV !! I encourage you to try the newly released 1.1.2 version !

reviews.review_title: This game has the great potential
reviews.review_description:
If you've played sprint vector before, this is the game that gives that same kind of feeling!

This game has good skill expression complexity that gives you that urge to keep trying and keep getting higher scores after every run.

I can see this game been extremely fun once the graphic gets more polishing (which honestly is the less stressful part of game development)

The core game play is solid!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback !!
